clips.title: pattern-matching is not reasoning
clips.idea: models pattern-match at a scale that feels like reasoning, and trusting that feeling ships bugs
clips.hook: They don't reason. They pattern-match at a scale that feels like reasoning.
clips.excerpt: They don't reason. They pattern-match at a scale that feels like reasoning. And the moment you trust the feeling, you ship the bug. So the fix isn't a smarter model. It's a tighter loop.

cut_ins.line: They pattern-match at a scale that feels like reasoning.
And the moment you trust the feeling, you ship the bug.
cut_ins.image_prompt: single subject, cinematic editorial photograph, no text
